title: Roast Potatoes
excerpt: Ingredients 6 peeled potatoes, cut into smaller pieces 65 ml cake flour 5 ml turmeric salt and pepper to taste oil for frying Method Cook the potatoes in water until half done. Drain, pat the potatoes dry and put them back in the pot. Sprinkle the flour, turmeric, salt and pepper over the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 6 peeled potatoes, cut into smaller pieces
  • 65 ml cake flour
  • 5 ml turmeric
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • oil for frying

Method

Cook the potatoes in water until half done. Drain, pat the potatoes dry and put them back in the pot.

Sprinkle the flour, turmeric, salt and pepper over the potatoes.

Put the lid on and shake the pot vigorously to coat the potatoes with flour and seasoning and rough up the outsides a little.

Heat about 2 cm of cooking oil in a dish in the oven before putting the potatoes in in a single layer.

Bake at 180°C and turn the potatoes regularly until they are golden brown and crisp.

Serves 4 – 6 portions as a side dish.

Easy!
